item.title: MIUI OS3.0.10.0.WPLCNXM Fastboot update for Redmi Turbo 5 Max China
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Redmi Turbo 5 Max China

Codename: dash

Version: OS3.0.10.0.WPLCNXM | 16.0

Size: 10.4 GB

MD5: 384d47a3f5f4bc47690050fa62330354

Changelog:
[System]
Optimization: Bluetooth audio
[Other improvements and optimizations]
Optimization: Wi-Fi connection for specific scenarios

Download: Here
